name: Changeover Matrix Optimizer
description: Industrial-grade tool for analyzing and optimizing changeover times between product families using Lean/SMED principles and Six Sigma methodologies.

inputs.label: Changeover Time Matrix (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Average time to switch from one product to another within the same production line. Based on SMED (Single-Minute Exchange of Die) standards.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average time to switch from one product to another within the same production line. Based on SMED (Single-Minute Exchange of Die) standards.

inputs.label: Number of Changeovers per Month
inputs.businessContext: Total changeovers performed monthly across all shifts. Used to calculate total changeover downtime.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total changeovers performed monthly across all shifts. Used to calculate total changeover downtime.

inputs.label: External Setup Time per Changeover (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Setup activities that can be performed while the machine is running (e.g., tool preparation). Target for SMED optimization.

businessContext_i18n.en: Setup activities that can be performed while the machine is running (e.g., tool preparation). Target for SMED optimization.

inputs.label: Internal Setup Time per Changeover (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Setup activities that require the machine to be stopped. Primary target for reduction via SMED.

businessContext_i18n.en: Setup activities that require the machine to be stopped. Primary target for reduction via SMED.

inputs.label: Number of Product Families
inputs.businessContext: Distinct product groups processed on the line. Higher counts increase changeover complexity.

businessContext_i18n.en: Distinct product groups processed on the line. Higher counts increase changeover complexity.

inputs.label: Standard Deviation of Changeover Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Measure of variability in changeover times. Used for Six Sigma process capability analysis.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measure of variability in changeover times. Used for Six Sigma process capability analysis.

inputs.label: Shift Pattern
inputs.businessContext: Operating schedule affecting available production time and changeover frequency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Operating schedule affecting available production time and changeover frequency.

inputs.label: SMED Implementation Status
inputs.businessContext: Indicates whether Single-Minute Exchange of Die principles have been formally applied.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates whether Single-Minute Exchange of Die principles have been formally applied.

rules.message: Sum of internal and external setup times cannot exceed total changeover time.
Target changeover time may be unrealistic without SMED implementation.
At least 2 product families required for matrix optimization.

thresholds.message: Changeover time exceeds 60 minutes. Immediate SMED analysis recommended.
Coefficient of variation >30%. Process is unstable. Apply Six Sigma DMAIC.
External setup ratio below 20%. Opportunity to convert internal to external tasks.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
